---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tree)
library(foreach)
library(doParallel)
library(pbapply)

# theta function using tree and pruning
theta <- function(new_data, train_data_df) {
  model <- tree(y ~ x1, data = train_data_df)
  pruned_model <- prune.tree(model, best = 5)
  predict(pruned_model, newdata = data.frame(x1 = new_data))
}

# bootstrap function
bootstrap <- function(indices, B, theta, df, new_data) {
  thetastar <- matrix(NA, nrow = B, ncol = length(new_data))
  for (b in 1:B) {
    sample_indices <- sample(indices, replace = TRUE)
    sample_df <- df[sample_indices, ]
    thetastar[b, ] <- theta(new_data, sample_df)
  }
  return(list(thetastar = thetastar))
}

# Simulation parameters
n <- 500
new_data <- seq(0, 1, length.out = 250)
seed <- 45

B <- 10000        # Paper: 10_000
n_sim <- 1000    # Paper: 1_000
noise_var <- .25

# Set up parallel processing
num_cores <- detectCores() -1
cl <- makeCluster(num_cores)
registerDoParallel(cl)

# Export necessary libraries and functions to the cluster
clusterExport(cl, c("tree", "prune.tree", "theta", "bootstrap", "n", "B",
                    "new_data", "seed", "noise_var", "run_simulation"))
clusterEvalQ(cl, {
  library(tree)
})

# Function to run a single simulation
run_simulation <- function(sim) {
  set.seed(seed + sim)

  # Generate data
  x1 <- runif(n, 0, 1)
  e <- rnorm(n, 0, sqrt(noise_var))
  y <- 0.7 * (x1 >= 0.35 & x1 < 0.45) + 0.7 * (x1 >= 0.55 & x1 < 0.65) +
    1.4 * (x1 >= 0.45 & x1 < 0.55) + e
  df <- data.frame(x1, y)

  # Bootstrap and bagging
  p <- bootstrap(1:n, B, theta, df, new_data)$thetastar
  colMeans(p)
}

# Start Simulation with progress bar
start_time <- Sys.time()
results <- pblapply(1:n_sim, function(sim) {
  run_simulation(sim)
}, cl = cl)

stopCluster(cl)
end_time <- Sys.time()
results <- do.call(rbind, results)
mean_values <- colMeans(results)
var_values <- apply(results, 2, var)

# Plot
filename <- paste("R_figure2_nB", B, "_seed", seed, ".png", sep = "")
png(filename = filename, width = 800, height = 400)
plot(new_data, var_values)
lines(new_data, var_values, col = "red")
dev.off()

# Output the execution time
execution_time <- end_time - start_time
cat("Execution time:\n", execution_time, "\n")
```
